voiceover_segments.text: Welcome to What People Want from AI, where AI demand meets real world supply.
I analyzed 1,000 real Upwork AI job postings — total budget pool: $1.65 million.
68% of AI demand is integration work — not building new AI, but connecting it to real businesses.
Category 1: AI Automation & Workflow — 55% of all jobs. Avg value $1,200–$1,500 per project.
Category 2: Content & Marketing AI — 25% of demand. Avg $600–$800. Category 3: Data Intelligence — 20%, highest rates.
3 strategies that win: existing tools first · progressive milestones · lead with measurable ROI math.
Real estate AI integrator: $1,200 · 7 systems connected · pays back in 3 months. Agentic developer: $5,000 on Claude API.
3 underserved opportunities: Voice AI agents · OpenClaw + Claude Code · AI content factory pipelines.
5 action steps — then subscribe. Where AI demand meets real world supply. This has been What People Want from AI.
